completed_slice: Added an independently configured, deny-by-default signer policy builder so trust cannot be bootstrapped from the attestation currently under evaluation.

verification.source: GitHub accepted the module, deterministic tests, and evidence artifact on the default branch.

blocker: Configure Cloudflare credentials plus an independently reviewed TRUSTED_SIGNER_CERT_SHA256 value in the cloudflare-research environment, wire the builder and signer-authorization output into the workflow acceptance invariant, then dispatch the workflow.
boundaries: No payment functionality was moved to Vercel.
No diagnosis or treatment claims were published.
No GitHub files or history were deleted.
next_action: Wire build-signer-policy.mjs, build-gh-signer-authorization-input.mjs, and evaluate-signer-authorization.mjs into the Cloudflare workflow and require status=authorized before final evidence acceptance.
